ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Whether the university is private or not */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Out-of-state tuition fees */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Room and board costs */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "personal" INTEGER /* Personal expenses */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the university */,
  "campus_size" INTEGER /* Size of the university campus */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* University website */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the admission record belongs to */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "accept" INTEGER /* Number of students accepted */,
  "enroll" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "top10perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 10% of their high school class */,
  "top25perc" INTEGER /* Percentage of students in the top 25% of their high school class */,
  "sat_avg" INTEGER /* Average SAT score of admitted students */,
  "act_avg" INTEGER /* Average ACT score of admitted students */,
  "gpa_avg" REAL /* Average GPA of admitted students */,
  "num_international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the faculty record belongs to */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduate faculty */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduate faculty */,
  "phd" INTEGER /* Number of faculty with a PhD */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Number of faculty with a terminal degree */,
  "s_f_ratio" REAL /* Student-faculty ratio */,
  "tenure_rate" REAL /* Tenure rate of faculty */,
  "adjunct_rate" REAL /* Adjunct rate of faculty */,
  "avg_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary of faculty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the financial record belongs to */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Total expenditures per student */,
  "grad_rate" INTEGER /* Graduation rate */,
  "avg_financial_aid" INTEGER /* Average financial aid received by students */,
  "avg_federal_loans" INTEGER /* Average federal loans taken out by students */,
  "avg_private_loans" INTEGER /* Average private loans taken out by students */,
  "avg_endowment" INTEGER /* Average endowment of the university */,
  "avg_tuition_discount" REAL /* Average tuition discount offered by the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finance_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the student record belongs to */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level of the student */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the student */,
  "full_time" INTEGER /* Number of full-time students */,
  "part_time" INTEGER /* Number of part-time students */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  "avg_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the campus record belongs to */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the campus */,
  "num_buildings" INTEGER /* Number of buildings on the campus */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students on the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the college record belongs to */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "dean" TEXT /* Dean of the college */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the college */,
  "num_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of faculty in the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colleges_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department record */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the department record belongs to */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "chair" TEXT /* Chair of the department */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the department */,
  "num_faculty" INTEGER /* Number of faculty in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the course record belongs to */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
